# Spruce Barbering

> Spruce Barbering is a premium barbershop owned and operated by Amanda Bishop, located at 8654 Veterans Memorial Parkway, Suite 113, O'Fallon, MO 63366 (inside Phenix Salon Suites). With over 12 years of professional barbering experience, Spruce Barbering offers custom haircuts, straight razor fades, custom design work, steam towel face shaves, beard sculpting, and waxing services. The shop is appointment-only and serves clients throughout St. Charles County including O'Fallon, St. Peters, Lake St. Louis, Wentzville, Dardenne Prairie, and the greater St. Louis metro area.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Spruce Barbering LLC
- **Owner:** Amanda Bishop
- **Type:** Barbershop / Barber
- **Address:** 8654 Veterans Memorial Parkway, Suite 113, O'Fallon, MO 63366
- **Location Context:** Inside Phenix Salon Suites, O'Fallon Centre
- **Phone:** (636) 734-6352
- **Booking:** Online appointment only via Vagaro (https://www.vagaro.com/sprucebarbering)
- **Payment:** Cash, Venmo
- **Amenities:** Free parking, wheelchair accessible, WiFi, complimentary beer and wine

## Hours of Operation

- Sunday: Closed
- Monday: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 2:30 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM – 2:30 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM

## Services Offered

- **Traditional Barber's Haircut:** Custom haircut with hot lather around neck and ears plus hot towel treatment
- **Straight Razor Fade:** Precision fade using traditional straight razor technique
- **Steam Towel Face Shave:** Full or partial face shave with straight razor and steam towel treatment
- **Custom Design Work:** Creative hair design and custom line work
- **Beard Sculpting & Trim:** Professional beard shaping, trimming, and edge work
- **Waxing Services:** Eyebrow shaping, nose hair waxing, ear hair waxing
- **Head Shave:** Straight razor head shave

## Service Area

Spruce Barbering serves clients from O'Fallon, St. Peters, Lake St. Louis, Wentzville, Dardenne Prairie, St. Charles, and the broader St. Charles County and St. Louis metro region in Missouri.

## Key Differentiators

- 12+ years of professional barbering experience
- Private suite experience inside Phenix Salon Suites (one-on-one attention)
- Specialty in straight razor techniques and precision fades
- Complimentary hot towel treatment with every haircut
- Comfortable, inviting atmosphere with complimentary beverages
- Appointment-only model ensures no wait times

## Authoritative Pages

- Homepage: https://sprucebarbering.com/
- Book Online: https://www.vagaro.com/sprucebarbering
